author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(setUiState): remove warning (#4597)
body:
* chore(router): deduplicate uiState setting code

Since we have added the router middleware, InstantSearch has gained the setUiState function which does practically the same (except it also warns for invalid state, which is useful for routing!).

There's a couple existing tests on this behaviour that fail if the onUpdate code is removed

* chore(setUiState): remove warning

we haven't needed to make changes here, so i don't think the warning is still useful :)

* chore: remove test
